# Chapter 5: Conduction, convection, radiation  (~120 pp)
- 5.1 Fourier's law of conduction (15) · 5.2 Steady and transient conduction (18) · 5.3 Convection: free and forced (18) · 5.4 Radiation: Stefan-Boltzmann, view factors (15) · 5.5 Combined heat transfer (15) · 5.6 Worked examples: insulated pipe, electronics cooling, building heat loss (18) · 5.7 Failure section: thermal runaway and where it actually happens (21)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, failure. **Project**: measure the U-value of a household wall over a winter month. **Exercises**: 40.
